name: @pangaealabs/marketplace-installer
description: Interactive npx installer for the Pangaea Labs Claude Code plugin marketplace. Installs skills into any agent (Claude Code, OpenClaw, Hermes, Cursor, Codex, …) using the universal ~/.agents/skills model, and sets up docsmith's ~/.docsmith/profile.yaml.

scripts.check: node --check installer/index.mjs && node --check installer/install.mjs && node --check installer/agents.mjs && node --check installer/marketplace.mjs && node --check installer/profile.mjs
